installCommand: sh -c 'if [ -z "$CARD_SCHEMA_READ_PAT" ]; then echo "ERROR: CARD_SCHEMA_READ_PAT is not set"; exit 1; fi; AUTHED="https://x-access-token:$CARD_SCHEMA_READ_PAT@github.com/"; git config --global --add url."$AUTHED".insteadOf "https://github.com/"; git config --global --add url."$AUTHED".insteadOf "git@github.com:"; git config --global --add url."$AUTHED".insteadOf "ssh://git@github.com/"; git config --global --add url."$AUTHED".insteadOf "git+ssh://git@github.com/"; git config --global --add url."$AUTHED".insteadOf "git+https://github.com/"' && npm ci
